title: artanthe hirsuta
intro: Artanthe hirsuta, also known as hairy cordia, is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Artanthe hirsuta include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Artanthe hirsuta is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
